scripts.test: node --test test/unit/*/*.test.js test/unit/*/*/*.test.js test/contracts/*.test.js test/charts/*/*.test.js test/docs/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include=src/**/*.js --test-coverage-lines=94 --test-coverage-branches=89 --test-coverage-functions=98 test/unit/*/*.test.js test/unit/*/*/*.test.js test/contracts/*.test.js test/charts/*/*.test.js test/docs/*.test.js
